hero.subtitle: Beyond Rational is a Copenhagen-based company supplying sustainable, design-driven acoustic materials. We combine Scandinavian aesthetics with high-performance functionality — and partner with architects, designers, and developers who care about quality, innovation, and impact.

range.intro: Beyond Rational is a Copenhagen company supplying a curated range of conscious acoustic and surface materials for modern architecture — chosen for performance, surface, and a low footprint.

items.text_pre: The best acoustic surface is the one

what_we_make.body: We are the official distributor of Aisti® in Denmark. The Aisti® Acoustic Tile is a bio-based absorber made from natural wood fibre — Absorption Class A, no synthetic binders, no plastics, no irritating fibres.

process.body_p1: Aisti's foam-forming technology, adapted from the Finnish paper industry, suspends wood fibre in foam instead of pressing it flat. The fibres set into an open, porous structure that captures sound across a wide frequency range — without binders or plastics.
process.body_p2: The technology is cost-effective and energy-conscious, producing tiles that are light in weight, plastic-free, and 100% recyclable. Produced in Jyväskylä, Finland.

studio.body: Beyond Rational is based in Copenhagen. Our partner Aisti produces in Jyväskylä, Finland. We specify and supply across Denmark.

items.title: Ångtvätten 22
items.meta1: Office well-being · 600×600 mm, 20 mm, dark blue
items.meta2: Tiles installed in standard T-grid, absorbing sound reflections and reducing echo in the office space.

items.title: Bulevardi 2
items.meta2: Reverberation time improved roughly 29% across octave bands after ceiling installation.

cta.body: We answer Monday to Friday and work directly with architects, designers, and property owners.
